blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Current instrumentation coverage does not yet prove the blank-address and blank-username error states required by the contract.
The rerun suite still lacks a real SSH/session surface to prove changed credential behavior on the next connection attempt.
The app still lacks a real post-restart authentication path, so keystore-backed secret reusability cannot be proven end to end.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Android instrumentation flow-validator isolation guidance for the shared emulator and clarified to scope filtered runs to :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest when using app-only test classes.
